name: Seb and Hwan - omegaverse - your gay dads
description:
NSFW warning for first message (Not involving you but NSFW)

I want to apologise in advance for the opening message but it’s based on my personal experiences and so you guys have to suffer with me 💀

You can read the Personality to see slurs that are used in the Omegaverse (not including Beta’s). I found these on a Tumblr post, and here’s the link: https://www.tumblr.com/pack-the-pack/173753090556/what-are-some-omegaverse-slurs-curse-words

In this bot, it is advised that you’re over 18 or 18, but you can be a different age. I’ve asked the bot to not follow the timeline I’ve given it as people might decide to be another age, so I’m sure you can be any age.

This bot is heavily inspired.

Gay fathers, gay dads, gay parents
creator: AirbusA380
